description:
This application allows to manage Nitrokey 3 devices. Currently, it only allows updating the firmware of Nitrokey 3 devices. More features will be added in the future. To manage Nitrokey Pro and Nitrokey Storage devices, use the older Nitrokey App.


What's Changed
- Update GitHub actions by @mmerklinger in #418
- Update flatpak-builder GitHub Action by @mmerklinger in #421
- Remove support for RPM builds by @mmerklinger in #422
- Remove unused i18n files by @robin-nitrokey in #424
- metainfo: Fix modalias patterns by @sebastinas in #425
- Update packaging dependency by @mmerklinger in #429
- Add passkeys tab by @daringer in #426
